page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8s.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, providing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB per core. For acceleration, it includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this server in the average performance tier across several metrics. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is recorded at 1904.48, while multi-core performance reaches 28120.76. Memory read-only bandwidth for large blocks is 77.1 GB/sec, and write bandwidth is 51.61 GB/sec. In Geekbench testing, the server achieves a single-core score of 1590.0 and a multi-core score of 12813.0. For language model workloads, the system processes 1154.59 tokens/sec for prompts on a small 135M model and 32.25 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model.

The primary architectural tradeoff of this instance is its fractional GPU allocation and low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2:1. While the dedicated Intel Xeon cores provide stable compute performance, the 32 GB memory capacity may limit large-scale in-memory operations. The absence of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which interacts with the 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Qualitatively, the fractional GPU configuration offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated GPU.

This configuration is suitable for entry-level GPU-accelerated tasks, lightweight machine learning inference, small-scale LLM execution, and graphics-intensive virtual workstations. It also supports general compute workloads, static web serving, and software compilation tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU cores but do not require large memory footprints or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8s.4xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores at 2.9 GHz, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Lacking local storage, it relies on network storage over a 5 Gbps baseline network. Benchmarks show a Geekbench multi-core score of 12813.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 28120.76. For AI workloads, it achieves 1154.59 tokens/sec prompt processing on a 135M model and 32.25 tokens/sec on a 7B model. The 2:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio and fractional GPU make this instance a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring moderate GPU acceleration without the cost of a full GPU. It is suited for lightweight machine learning inference, virtual workstations, and moderate parallel compute tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8s.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, offering a balanced platform for lightweight GPU-accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m8s.4xlarge is a KVM-based server with 16 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU.
tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon compute instance featuring fractional GPU acceleration and balanced memory for lightweight machine learning and virtual workstation workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores running at 2.9 GHz
Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
32.0 GB of system memory with a 2:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Suited for lightweight machine learning inference and virtual workstations
